arts.ttl: Club walk away from Southampton player despite his ‘real desire’ for transfer – Operation ‘too complicated to finalise’
arts.sum: Last summer, Southampton’s Kamaldeen Sulemana came close to joining Ajax before the move collapsed. Russell Martin didn’t include the winger in his core plans and limited him to 70 minutes from seven games. arts.ttl: Champions League Giant Want ‘Special’ Southampton Star, He Could Push to Leave
arts.sum: Southampton's rising star will likely be on the move next summer and one of the Champions League's most successful clubs want him.

arts.ttl: Ipswich winger Burns to miss rest of season with torn ACL
arts.sum: Ipswich winger Wes Burns is out for the rest of the season after suffering a torn anterior cruciate ligament during last weekend's defeat at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss makes new Cameron Archer transfer admission amid Leeds United pursuit
arts.sum: And now Juric says he believes Archer - his club’s top scorer with five goals in 25 matches - will stay at St Mary's beyond transfer deadline day. Leeds boss Daniel Farke has kept the door open for a striker arrival in the final days of the window with Patrick Bamford still sidelined with a hamstring injury and United otherwise being one injury away from having only one fit centre-forward.

Ipswich welcome Southampton to Portman Road off the back of three straight Premier League defeats, with the most recent two coming at the hands of Manchester City and Liverpool. Kieran McKenna's side...

arts.ttl: Ipswich target Mohamed Bayo nearing Belgium move
arts.sum: Lille OSC’s Mohamed Bayo (26), a target for Premier League side Ipswich, is set to join Belgian side Royal Antwerp, according to a report from Foot Mercato. Bayo has found…

arts.ttl: Ipswich set to miss out on transfer as club close to securing loan deal ahead of them
arts.sum: Ipswich Town appear set to miss out on the signing of Lille striker Mohamed Bayo as he’s close to joining Antwerp instead. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the striker is close to leaving Lille but won’t be destined for Ipswich. arts.ttl: Ipswich Town take 'concrete steps' to sign international striker who will decide future 'in the coming hours'
arts.sum: Ipswich Town are reportedly battling Besiktas and Royal Antwerp for the signing of Lille striker Mohamed Bayo before the conclusion of the winter transfer window.
